explanation: This command simulates the use of NirCmd to execute a process as the SYSTEM user, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
Adding quotes around the command preserves functionality while testing detection resilience.
Using a short form or alternative syntax for the command line to test detection coverage.

Adding an optional argument to test whether the detection rule is resilient to additional command-line parameters.
